content:
If you're looking for SHOP health coverage for 2024, preview 2024 SHOP plans and prices.

You can download data for 2024 SHOP health plans available to businesses in states where the federal government is operating the SHOP Marketplace. States not included run their own SHOP Marketplaces.

  • Instructions (PDF, 163 KB)
  • 2024 SHOP health plan data (ZIP file, 2.3 MB)

You can also get:

  • 2024 SHOP dental plan information
  • 2023 SHOP health plan information

Learn more about the Affordable Care Act.
